Who We Are

Rooted in practice,
driven by purpose

Yujasva is a collective of 7 passionate yoga instructors and co-founders based in Pune, dedicated to making yoga meaningful, accessible, and impactful — for individuals, corporate teams, and communities alike.

We conduct live online batches, corporate wellness sessions, and community events. Our work goes beyond asanas — we talk about health, awareness, and the importance of staying active in everyday life.

Get in Touch
Our Mission
Creating spaces to pause, breathe & reset

From school grounds in Pune to corporate boardrooms, we bring yoga where it's needed most — with warmth, expertise, and genuine care for every participant's wellbeing.

✓ Live online batches across India
✓ On-site corporate wellness programs
✓ Community events & workshops
✓ Women's health specialisation
Meet the Team

The people behind Yujasva

Seven co-founders, one shared vision — to make wellness accessible, meaningful, and joyful for every individual and organisation we work with.

Shalini Soman
COO
Leads operations and strategic direction, ensuring every Yujasva session runs seamlessly.
Anika Pethe
CFO
Manages the financial health of Yujasva, keeping our programmes sustainable and impactful.
Priti Abhyankar
Social Media Manager
Shares Yujasva's story with the world through authentic, inspiring digital content.
Riya Yadav
Social Media Manager
Crafts engaging campaigns and grows Yujasva's community across digital platforms.
Rucha Kanitkar
People Engagement Manager
Nurtures participant relationships and ensures every event fosters real connection.
Arya Inamdar
Administration Officer
Keeps Yujasva's logistics running smoothly, from scheduling to coordination.
Chinu Kelkar
People Relationship Manager
Builds lasting relationships with clients and collaborators, making Yujasva feel like family.

International Women's Day Event
What We Offer

Practice that fits your life

Whether you're a corporate team looking to reduce burnout or an individual wanting to build a regular practice, we have a session for you.

🌐
Online Batches

Live, interactive yoga sessions over video. Scheduled batches across multiple styles and skill levels — join from anywhere in India.

🏢
Corporate Yoga

Tailored wellness programs for your workplace. On-site or virtual, designed to reduce burnout, back pain, and improve team wellbeing.

🎉
Events & Workshops

Special themed sessions, wellness days, and community events — like our Digital Detox and Women's Health workshops.

🌿
Hatha Yoga

Foundational postures, breathwork, and mindfulness. Ideal for beginners and those seeking a grounding, steady practice.

🔥
Vinyasa Flow

Dynamic, breath-linked movement sequences that build strength, flexibility, and cardiovascular health.

💆
Women's Health

Specialised sessions on menstrual health, menopause, and lifestyle habits — combining yoga, movement, and open conversation.

Our Impact

Events we've proudly led

🌸 International Women's Day
Yoga & Menstrual Health at Renuka Swaroop Girls School

Over 550 students, faculty, and Rotarians came together on the school grounds for a session on menstrual health and a guided outdoor yoga practice.

Rotary Club of Pune Sinhagad Road
📱 8th February
The Digital Detox — Stretch, Breathe & Disconnect

Over 30 participants slowed down with pranayama, eye yoga, and stretches. People consciously disconnected from devices and reconnected with each other.

Rotaract Club of Pune Sinhagad Road
👩‍💼 7th March
Women's Health Session at Brintons Carpets Asia

Led a lecture on menstrual health and menopause for women employees, sparking open conversations about back pain, stress, and yoga stretches for the workday.

Brintons Carpets Asia Pvt. Ltd.

Why Yujasva

Yoga done with intention

01

A Team of 7 Co-founders

Not a single instructor juggling everything — a dedicated team with diverse specialisations ensures quality at every session.

02

Online & Offline Flexibility

Whether your team is remote, hybrid, or in-office, we come to you — physically or virtually, anywhere in Pune and beyond.

03

Community-Driven Events

We've led sessions for 550+ students, digital detox workshops, and corporate health talks — real impact, not just exercise.

04

Women's Health Focus

Our sessions include menstrual health education, menopause awareness, and holistic wellbeing conversations.

"We're committed to creating simple spaces to pause, breathe, and reset."
